commands.title: Check Anonymous Login (Nmap)
commands.description: Checks if the FTP server allows anonymous login using Nmap.

commands.title: Brute Force FTP Login (Hydra)
commands.description: Attempts to brute-force FTP login credentials using Hydra.

commands.title: Brute Force FTP Login (Medusa)
commands.description: Uses Medusa for brute-forcing FTP credentials.

commands.title: Retrieve FTP Banner
commands.description: Retrieves FTP service banner to gather version and OS info.

commands.title: Run All FTP Nmap Scripts
commands.description: Runs all FTP NSE scripts to enumerate vulnerabilities and configurations.

commands.title: Check for FTP Bounce Attack
commands.description: Tests if the FTP server is vulnerable to a bounce attack.

commands.title: Basic FTP Enumeration (NetExec)
commands.description: Enumerates FTP service using NetExec with given credentials.

commands.title: List Root Directory (NetExec)
commands.description: Lists files in the root directory via authenticated FTP session.

commands.title: List Specific Directory (NetExec)
commands.description: Lists contents of a specific FTP directory.

commands.title: Download File (NetExec)
commands.description: Downloads a file from the FTP server using NetExec.

commands.title: Upload File (NetExec)
commands.description: Uploads a file to the FTP server using NetExec.

commands.title: Example: Directory Listing
commands.description: Example of listing files with NetExec.

commands.title: Example: Upload File
commands.template: nxc ftp 10.10.176.246 -u frank -p D2xc9CgD --put test.txt test.txt
